message:
feat(frankenpandas): expose Bayesian Runtime inspection types (fd90.221 / br-a179t)

The README's "Bayesian Runtime Policy" section (lines 378-403)
documents EvidenceLedger as user-inspectable: "Every decision is
recorded in the EvidenceLedger with full trace: timestamp, mode, prior,
posterior, Bayes factor, and the evidence terms that drove it."

EvidenceLedger.records() returns &[DecisionRecord], and DecisionRecord
has public fields of types that were all hidden from frankenpandas:
- mode: RuntimeMode
- action: DecisionAction
- issue: CompatibilityIssue (with IssueKind variant enum)
- metrics: DecisionMetrics
- evidence: Vec<EvidenceTerm>

Plus GalaxyBrainCard (return type of decision_to_card).

User code inspecting the ledger per the README's claim could not
match against the action enum:

    for record in ledger.records() {
        match record.action {
            DecisionAction::Allow => ...,    // unreachable
            ...
        }
    }

Fix:
- Add 9 items (RuntimeMode, DecisionAction, IssueKind, CompatibilityIssue,
  EvidenceTerm, DecisionMetrics, DecisionRecord, GalaxyBrainCard,
  decision_to_card) to top-level fp_runtime re-exports
- Add same 9 to prelude
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-9w0b","title":"Expand Series str accessor conformance fixtures","description":"Add conformance fixtures for Series.str accessor methods. Currently only 1 fixture exists (str_get_dummies) but 40+ str methods are implemented in fp-frame. Cover: str.lower/upper/capitalize, str.strip/lstrip/rstrip, str.contains, str.startswith/endswith, str.len, str.replace, str.slice, str.split, str.isdigit/isalpha/isalnum/isspace, str.center/ljust/rjust/zfill, str.count, str.find.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T16:28:22.562853964Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T16:44:59.170881977Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T16:44:59.168653654Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-9ye","title":"Add metamorphic tests for combine_first relations","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-16T23:04:58.543635719Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-16T23:13:41.834173246Z","closed_at":"2026-04-16T23:13:41.832213214Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenpandas-9ynk","title":"fd90.27: write_sql identifier-length validation using max_identifier_length probe","description":"Apply fd90.26's max_identifier_length() capability in write_sql_with_options: when the backend reports Some(n), validate the table name, every column name, and index_label against n bytes. Returns IoError::Sql with a clear message identifying which identifier exceeded the limit. SQLite (None) is unaffected. Helper sql_validate_identifier_length(name, max, kind) used internally. Tests cover SQLite no-op, PG-like stub rejecting long table name, long column name, long index_label, and just-fits boundary.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"cc-pandas-2","created_at":"2026-04-25T20:50:35.735477288Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-25T20:53:31.828961864Z","closed_at":"2026-04-25T20:53:31.826421409Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["fd90","review","sql"]}
-{"id":"frankenpandas-a179t","title":"fd90.221: Expose Bayesian Runtime Policy inspection types (DecisionRecord/etc.)","description":"fd90.221: Expose Bayesian Runtime Policy inspection surface (7 fp-runtime types).

The README's "Bayesian Runtime Policy" section (lines 378-403) documents the EvidenceLedger as user-inspectable: "Every decision is recorded in the EvidenceLedger with full trace: timestamp, mode, prior, posterior, Bayes factor, and the evidence terms that drove it."

EvidenceLedger.records() returns &[DecisionRecord]. DecisionRecord has public fields whose types are all hidden from frankenpandas:
- mode: RuntimeMode
- action: DecisionAction
- issue: CompatibilityIssue
- metrics: DecisionMetrics
- evidence: Vec<EvidenceTerm>

Plus IssueKind (variant enum on CompatibilityIssue) and GalaxyBrainCard (return type of decision_to_card).

User code:
    for record in ledger.records() {
        match record.action {
            DecisionAction::Allow => ...,    // unreachable
            DecisionAction::Reject => ...,
            ...
        }
    }

cannot compile from frankenpandas alone.

Scope:
- Add to top-level fp_runtime re-export: RuntimeMode, DecisionAction, IssueKind, CompatibilityIssue, EvidenceTerm, DecisionMetrics, DecisionRecord, GalaxyBrainCard, decision_to_card
- Add to prelude
- Extend prelude_completeness_compile_guard

- evidence: Vec<EvidenceTerm>
